## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss PR plan for GrowthX's upcoming funding announcement and product launch](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Timing: Aim for announcement \~1 month out to complete key hires and catch breath](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Narrative: Position GrowthX as empowering marketers with AI, not replacing them](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Targets: Focus on larger companies/enterprises struggling to leverage AI for marketing](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Proof points: Secure customer quotes (e.g. Ramp) to validate impact and outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### Timing Considerations

  - [Currently have high demand; booked through March, signing April contracts](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Want \~1 month to complete key hires and initiatives before announcement](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Potential key hire: Matthew (former TechCrunch editor-in-chief) could help with TechCrunch angle](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Announcement Goals & Positioning

  - [Raise awareness among scale-ups/enterprises vs. tiny startups](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Highlight urgency for brands to become publishers in new marketing landscape](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Position as empowering marketers with AI, not replacing them](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [Emphasize tangible ROI and outcomes vs. just workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Frame as elevating marketers to "100x version of themselves"](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)

### Potential Narrative Angles

  - [Blurring lines between services and software with AI](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Expert-led, AI-powered approach vs. AI replacement](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Organic content/growth vs. diminishing returns of paid channels](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Making complex marketing stacks (e.g. HubSpot workflows) more effective](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Customer Stories & Proof Points

  - [Ramp: Early customer, recent $13B valuation, Super Bowl ad](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Reddit: Consumer angle, authoritative site, AI-native aspirations](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Other potentials: Hims, Abnormal Security, SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)
  - [Balance between showcasing impact and customer desire for exclusivity](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### PR Strategy & Outlets

  - [Consider phased approach: initial launch + sustained follow-up content](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Explore beyond just TechCrunch (though connection helpful)](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Target CMO-focused publications if possible](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Leverage Marcel's viral LinkedIn posts as thought leadership examples](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Caleb: Create initial PR plan framework](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Marcel: Compile relevant stats, resources, and customer anecdotes (1 week)](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)
  - [Team: Identify optimal announcement timing](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [All: Brainstorm potential PR outlets beyond TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)
  - [Marcel: Share past viral LinkedIn posts for context](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=2122.0)
  - [Follow-up: Review compiled materials and refine PR strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s9uNLCFLD54U4S4Z67Qx4rJAySdu59vN?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)
